steps.title: Identify both reasons
steps.content: The text gives two reasons literary juvenilia matters: works by famous authors can reveal artistic development, and works by lesser-known writers can help scholars understand literary history.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: A discusses publication challenges, which the text does not mention. C compares young writers with adult contemporaries, not the text's focus. D ranks Benton's novels against Dickens's juvenilia, which the text never does. The main purpose is to present reasons juvenilia is valuable. The answer is B.
